pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project is migrating to JDK 21; keeping version 17 would result in compiling for the wrong target or failing if the build environment enforces JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version from 2.6.13 to 3.0.6 to support JDK 21 and Jakarta EE.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support JDK 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* packages, which are removed/incompatible in the Jakarta EE 9+ namespace required by Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to 3.10.1 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not fully support JDK 21 language features or module system nuances, potentially causing build failures.
